title: A Bike to Beat the Commute
scenario: Your daily commute is painful. A new bike on a ₹90,000 loan would help, but public transport is far cheaper. What's the call?

choices.label: Take the bike loan now
choices.lesson: A vehicle is a convenience, not an investment — it depreciates and adds fuel, service and EMI costs. Borrow for it only if you truly need it.

choices.label: Stick with public transport for now
choices.lesson: Delaying a depreciating purchase keeps your cash flow free. You can always buy later, in cash, once your basics are solid.
